data.name: Error_MessageNotReached
data.value: LanMountain Desktop did not reach the expected startup state.

data.name: Error_SuggestionMessage
data.value: You can inspect logs, wait for the current process, or activate the running desktop instance.

data.name: Error_HostNotFoundTitle
data.value: Launcher could not find the desktop executable

data.name: Error_HostNotFoundMessage
data.value: Pick another executable in debug mode, inspect logs, or retry after fixing the deployment path.

data.name: Error_GenericRetryMessage
data.value: Inspect logs, then retry once the previous startup attempt has fully finished.

data.name: Error_GenericNoRetryMessage
data.value: Inspect logs or exit. Launcher will avoid creating another desktop process while the old one is still running.

data.name: Error_PendingMessage
data.value: The desktop process is still running, so Launcher will not start a second instance.

data.name: Error_PendingMessageWithPid
data.value: The desktop process is still running, so Launcher will not start a second instance. Current host PID: {0}.

data.name: MultiInstance_AlreadyRunningMessage
data.value: Launcher found an existing desktop instance and did not start another process.

data.name: MultiInstance_RepeatedLaunchMessage
data.value: Your current setting is to show this prompt without opening the desktop automatically.

data.name: MultiInstance_NoSecondProcess
data.value: No second Host process was created.

data.name: MultiInstance_DetailsFormat
DataLocation_ChooseLocationDesc
data.value: Choose where launcher and desktop data should be stored. You can change this later in settings.

data.name: DataLocation_NotWritableDesc
data.value: The current install directory requires elevated permissions. Data will be stored in the system user profile instead.

data.name: DataLocation_SystemProfile
data.value: Store in the system user profile (Recommended)

data.name: DataLocation_SystemProfileDesc
data.value: Data stays tied to the current Windows user and remains intact across app reinstalls and updates.

data.name: DataLocation_PortableDesc
data.value: Useful for portable installs. The whole app folder can be moved to another machine together with its data.

data.name: DataLocation_MigrateWarning
data.value: Existing system data was detected. Choosing portable mode will migrate the current data automatically.

data.name: Update_FailedMessage
data.value: An error occurred during the update

data.name: DebugDebug_DevModeDesc
data.value: Automatically scan dev directories when enabled

data.name: DebugDebug_Warning
data.value: This feature is for developers only

data.name: Oobe_WelcomeSubtitle
data.value: Your desktop, more than one side

data.name: Oobe_AppearanceDesc
data.value: Choose your preferred theme style. You can change it anytime in settings.

data.name: Oobe_SystemProfile
data.value: Store in the system user profile (Recommended)

data.name: Oobe_SystemProfileDesc
data.value: Data stays tied to the current Windows user and remains intact across app reinstalls and updates.

data.name: Oobe_PortableDesc
data.value: Useful for portable installs. The whole app folder can be moved to another machine together with its data.

data.name: Oobe_NotWritableDesc
data.value: The current install directory requires elevated permissions. Data will be stored in the system user profile instead.

data.name: Oobe_ShowInTaskbar
data.value: Show main desktop window in taskbar

data.name: Oobe_SlideTransition
data.value: Show main window with slide transition

data.name: Oobe_AutoStart
data.value: Automatically start LanMountain Desktop on Windows login

data.name: Oobe_PrivacyPolicyLink
data.value: LanMountain Desktop Telemetry Privacy Data Collection Agreement

data.name: Oobe_CompleteSubtitle
data.value: Your desktop, more than one side

data.name: Oobe_MonetDesc
data.value: Automatically extract theme colors from your wallpaper for a seamless desktop experience

data.name: Oobe_MonetFromWallpaperDesc
data.value: Analyze current wallpaper colors to generate a theme

data.name: Oobe_MonetFromCustomImageDesc
data.value: Choose an image as the color source

data.name: Oobe_MonetDisabledDesc
data.value: Use a fixed preset theme color

data.name: Oobe_DataLocationDesc
data.value: Decide where to store app data. You can change this anytime in settings.

data.name: Oobe_StartupDesc
data.value: These options can be changed anytime in the desktop app Settings. Slide-in entrance is only available on Windows.

data.name: Oobe_ShowInTaskbarDesc
data.value: When enabled, a taskbar entry remains when minimized; when disabled, rely more on the tray icon.

data.name: Oobe_SlideTransitionDesc
data.value: Slide in from screen edge; mutually exclusive with fade-in.

data.name: Oobe_FadeTransitionDesc
data.value: Recommended when slide-in is not enabled.

data.name: Oobe_FusedDesktopDesc
data.value: Enable fused desktop and three-finger swipe gesture for edge pop-in and related experimental features (same as developer options in Settings).

data.name: Oobe_AutoStartDesc
data.value: Register this launcher as the current user's startup item (same registry entry as the optional installer task).

data.name: Oobe_AutoStartDescNonWindows
data.value: Only the preference is saved on this platform; use the system's app auto-start settings for actual auto-start behavior.

data.name: Oobe_PrivacyDesc
data.value: Choose whether to participate in the telemetry program and review the privacy policy

data.name: Oobe_CrashReportsDesc
data.value: Help improve app stability; no personal identity information is included

data.name: Oobe_UsageStatsDesc
data.value: Help understand feature usage and optimize product experience

data.name: Oobe_PrivacyTrackingIdDesc
data.value: This ID is used to anonymously identify your device and does not contain any personal information

data.name: Oobe_PrivacyAgreementNote
data.value: You must read and agree to the privacy policy before enabling telemetry features. Telemetry data is used solely to improve app stability and optimize product experience, and does not contain any personal identity information.

data.name: Oobe_MigrationDetected
data.value: Existing data detected. It will be migrated automatically when portable mode is selected.

data.name: Migration_DetectedDesc
data.value: An older version of LanMountain Desktop (0.8.4) was detected on your system. Uninstalling it is recommended to avoid conflicts.

data.name: Migration_UninstallNote
data.value: Uninstalling the old version will not affect the new version. Your personal data will be preserved.

data.name: Migration_DetectedDescFormat
data.value: An older version of LanMountain Desktop ({0}) was detected on your system. The new version uses a completely new architecture. Uninstalling the old version is recommended for a better experience.

data.name: Privacy_Title
data.value: LanMountain Desktop Telemetry Privacy Data Collection Agreement

data.name: Privacy_Header
data.value: LanMountain Desktop Telemetry Privacy Data Collection Agreement

data.name: Privacy_Description
data.value: Please read the following agreement carefully to understand how we collect, use, and protect your data

data.name: Coordinator_SlowDeviceMessage
data.value: The device is slow and still starting up. Please wait.

data.name: Coordinator_RunningHostMessage
data.value: The desktop process is still running. Launcher will continue waiting and will not start again.

data.name: Preview_ErrorMessage
data.value: [Preview] This is the launcher error window preview.
